changelog:
Admin UI redesign: full-width responsive layout, in-app modals/toasts (no native browser dialogs), and a modular front-end split.

=== Full-width responsive layout (web/styles.css, web/index.html) ===

- .content was capped at max-width 1280px with no horizontal centering, so on wide screens it hugged the left with dead space on the right. It is now centered (margin: 0 auto), the cap raised to 1600px, and the topbar wrapped in a matching .topbar-inner track so the header aligns with the content. Added an intermediate breakpoint (<=1100px) for padding; existing mobile breakpoints preserved. Verified at 1920px (content fills + centered) and 390px (no horizontal scroll, KPI grid collapses to 2 columns).

=== No native browser dialogs (web/app.js, web/index.html, web/styles.css, web/i18n.js) ===

- Replaced ~120 native alert() calls with a custom toast notification (success/error variants, auto-dismiss, top-right stack) by overriding window.alert.
- Replaced 11 native confirm() / prompt() calls with promise-based uiConfirm() / uiPrompt() in-app modals (danger variant for destructive actions). Added the common.confirm i18n key (CN/EN).

=== Overview declutter + chart polish (web/index.html, web/styles.css, web/app.js) ===

- Overview reworked into a hero chart + 4 primary KPI cards + a secondary stat strip; the lone Credits card folded into a balanced 3-across row with Top Models and Health. KPI cards tightened. uPlot x-axis now uses an explicit M/D formatter to avoid the default time-tick artifact.

=== Modular front-end (web/) ===

- The single 6.4k-line index.html was split into index.html (markup shell), styles.css, i18n.js (CN/EN dictionary), and app.js (logic), served same-origin under /admin/*. uPlot vendored locally under web/vendor/. Zero-build: files served via http.ServeFile under the existing static jail and CSP.
